response.overview: In the shadows of the sun soaked streets during yet another hot summer in Podgorica, a loving couple named Ksenija and Ljubo are expecting, with the pregnancy process being carefully watched over by the latter's two conservative aunts, with the soon-to-be mother struggling to fight back against their influence without much succsess. After the birth finally occurs, Ksenija falls into depression as she can't produce milk and the two women decide that their sphere of influence can't just stop at the womb.
response.tagline: Searching for a way out of a hopeless situation, a woman jumps. But she doesn't jump alone
response.title: Plod
